label: Industry sector
hint: Select the IoT sector that best matches your activity. Badges indicate current B2B demand on Iotplace.

industry_40.name: Industry 4.0 (Industrial IoT — IIoT)
industry_40.applications: Predictive maintenance, machine monitoring, quality control, digital twins, connected robotics

logistics.name: Logistics & Supply Chain
logistics.applications: GPS tracking, fleet management, goods traceability, cold-chain temperature monitoring, smart warehouses

energy.name: Energy & Utilities
energy.applications: Smart grid, smart meters, energy management, power networks, infrastructure monitoring
energy.clients: Energy providers, utilities, water and gas

smart_buildings.name: Smart Buildings
smart_buildings.applications: Energy management, connected HVAC, security, access control, space occupancy

smart_cities.name: Smart Cities
smart_cities.applications: Smart lighting, connected parking, waste management, air quality, urban monitoring

health.name: Connected Health (IoMT)
health.applications: Remote monitoring, medical wearables, connected hospitals, patient tracking

mobility.name: Mobility & Connected Vehicles
mobility.applications: Telematics, fleet management, autonomous vehicles, V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything)

retail.name: Retail & Connected Commerce
retail.applications: Smart shelves, stock management, behavioural analytics, connected payments

agriculture.name: Connected Agriculture (AgriTech IoT)
agriculture.applications: Smart irrigation, soil sensors, connected livestock, agricultural drones

security.name: Security & Surveillance
security.applications: Smart cameras, intrusion detection, access control, industrial surveillance

smart_home.name: Smart Home
smart_home.tagline: Huge volume market, dominated by major brands.
smart_home.applications: Thermostats, lighting, alarms, connected home appliances

environment.name: Environment & Climate
environment.applications: Pollution monitoring, water management, fire detection, environmental monitoring

maritime.name: Maritime & Ports
maritime.applications: Container tracking, vessel monitoring, smart ports

defense.name: Defence & National Security
defense.applications: Terrain surveillance, sensor networks, military logistics
